entries.current_position: RP-C07 is COMPLETE with AJ-01/AJ-03/AJ-11/AJ-12 UNPROVEN. RP-C01-M05 and RP-C01-M08 are PROVEN. M07/AJ-03 still need only a genuine non-owner trial; M02/CAP-015/AJ-01 still require fresh Work/Athena origin; M06 still requires protected execution. Counts remain 13 RESTORED, 7 IMPROVED, 4 PRESERVED, 1 REPLACED, 1 INTENTIONALLY_RETIRED, 0 BLOCKED, and 2 STILL_MISSING. RP-C01, RP-C08, and Repairing Prime remain IN_PROGRESS.
blockers: RP-C01-M02, CAP-015, and AJ-01 require a fresh Jayson-started Work/Athena submission with an external origin receipt bound to the hosted event, carrier, mission, run, and draft PR.
RP-C01-M06 protected-path handoff detection is proven, but protected execution was not run.
RP-C01-M07 and AJ-03 require a genuine non-owner with legitimate workflow-dispatch permission to produce OWNER_IDENTITY_REJECTED with exact no-mutation evidence.
CAP-027 remains missing while AJ-01, AJ-03, AJ-11, and AJ-12 are UNPROVEN.
AJ-11 requires clean-clone recovery, deterministic regeneration, rollback classification, and no-Codex-dependency readback at final RP-C08 main.
AJ-12 requires complete Ubuntu and Windows validation at final merged RP-C08 main.
entries.next_action: Preserve the accepted M08 free-form evidence and continue only through the separate remaining fresh-origin, protected-execution, genuine-non-owner, CAP-027, clean-clone, final validation, whole-Quest review, Phoenix recovery, and Sunset gates.
entries.next_approval: Fresh Work/Athena origin, protected-route execution, a genuine non-owner rejection, final Quest closure, and permanence retain their existing separate authority and evidence gates.

entries.current_position: FS-C01-M01, M02, and M03 are PROVEN. The ledger, receipts, lifecycle binding, recovery, rollback planning, exact-head CI, and canonical synthetic exercise are accepted; M04 live acceptance remains unproven.
blockers: FS-C01-M04 requires a Jayson-selected protected external store and one bounded trusted provider/runtime usage receipt with authoritative category semantics.
entries.next_action: Await a separately authorized Jayson-selected protected store and one bounded trusted provider/runtime usage receipt, then execute FS-C01-M04 without widening the accepted construction boundary.
entries.next_approval: Jayson must separately select the protected external store and authorize the bounded trusted usage acceptance journey.
